page: Amazon Web Services trn1n.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8375C processors. It features 128 vCPUs and 64 physical cores with hyper-threading running at 3.5 GHz, supported by a 54 MB L3 cache. The system is equipped with 512 GB of DDR4 memory operating at 3 GHz, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance includes 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, offering high-capacity, low-latency local data access. It operates on the AWS Nitro hypervisor and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps, making it highly optimized for network-heavy and data-intensive operations. No discrete GPUs are included in this hardware configuration.

In benchmark testing, the trn1n.32xlarge demonstrates top-tier performance, placing in the top 10% for Passmark CPU, extended instructions, and encryption tests. Multi-core performance is strong, ranking in the top 25% for stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and ray tracing. Memory bandwidth is also highly capable, with large-block read operations reaching 333.01 GB/sec.

Given its massive local NVMe storage, high network throughput, and strong multi-core processing capabilities, this server is well-suited for large-scale database operations, high-throughput web serving, and Redis deployments. The qualitative cost profile reflects a high-density resource allocation, balancing massive compute power with substantial local storage and high-speed networking for demanding enterprise workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services trn1n.32xlarge is an x86_64 server powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8375C processors, featuring 128 vCPUs, 64 physical cores, and 512 GB of DDR4 memory. Operating on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, it includes 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a 100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. In benchmark evaluations, the server delivers top-tier performance in Passmark CPU, extended instructions, and encryption tests, alongside strong multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. While this configuration does not include discrete GPUs, its massive local storage and high network throughput make it highly efficient for data-intensive workloads. It is optimized for large-scale databases, high-throughput web serving, Redis deployments, and multi-threaded enterprise applications requiring high resource density.

tagline: A high-density compute and storage platform featuring 128 vCPUs, 7.6 TB of local NVMe SSD, and 100 Gbps networking.

512 GB DDR4 memory and 7600 GB local NVMe SSD storage
